themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "Basil of Caesarea: The command of God advanced step by step and earth thus received her adorn...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּרְד֞וּ: and have dominion - to tread down, i.e., subjugate; specifically, to crumble off".
